message:
refactor: simplify sprout-internal dispatch and test setup

- Extract parseJsonArgs and executeInternalTool helpers to reduce
  nesting in buildAgentToolPrimitives
- Simplify loadAgentToolsWithBootstrap merge to declarative filter
- Use genome.saveAgentTool in tests instead of raw mkdir+writeFile

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
